title: Intensely Garlicky Portuguese Challots Wrap
description: A tender and flavorful Portuguese dish featuring challots, perfect for a weeknight dinner, made with ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients and cooking methods.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced challots with minced garlic, olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Lay a collard green leaf flat on a work surface and place about 1/2 cup of the challot mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining leaves and filling.
Place the rolls seam-side down in a steamer basket and steam for 10 minutes.
Serve the rolls hot with a squeeze of lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
